name: Induct Software AS
summary: Induct Software AS offers cloud-based innovation communities delivered as software as a service. Its platform that enables organizations to create, manage, track, and measure the innovation process from idea creation through to final implementation and impact reporting. The company serves private enterprises, governments, education and science networks, and healthcare industries. Induct Software AS has a strategic partnership with ICREA to expand its market penetration and presence in the United States, Europe, Africa, Indian Subcontinent, and GCC and CIS countries. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
